description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest, and windows-2025) with different configurations. For each job, check out the repository, set up the environment (installing dependencies like cppunit, utf8cpp, and zlib), configure and build the project using CMake, and run tests with ctest.
